testcase.name: Settings app launches successfully

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'innovatives-MacBook-Pro.local', ip: '2401:4900:9151:2e0b:e9a5:ab56:1160:e6e8%en0'
